message:
feat(fp-index): add Index.asof/searchsorted/memory_usage/nlevels parity (frankenpandas-gsq6)

Four Index helpers + a new IndexError variant:

- asof(key) — nearest-preceding-or-equal label lookup for monotonic-
  ascending indexes. Uses IndexLabel::cmp (derived Ord) so callers
  don't need a separate comparator. Returns None when `key` precedes
  every entry.
- searchsorted(value, side) — bisect position with left/right side
  selection, matching pd.Index.searchsorted. Rejects invalid sides
  and missing needles via the new IndexError::InvalidArgument
  variant.
- memory_usage(deep) — approximate byte footprint; fixed-width
  types cost 8 bytes, Utf8 costs size_of::<String>() plus the
  string's byte length when deep=true.
- nlevels() — always 1 for flat Index, lets callers write
  level-agnostic code that also works on MultiIndex (which has its
  own nlevels).

Co-lands frankenpandas-vjms (searchsorted), wl2d (memory_usage),
x6cy (nlevels).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
